verdictSummary: HSS Academic Visitor Program is a genuine, well-documented public observership pathway: 14 PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims from hss.edu/education-institute/academic-visitor-program carry definite-offer quotes (audience, eligibility, duration, application, benefits). One meta-claim (hss-avp-scope-001, claimType=SCOPE_CONFLICT) was incorrectly promoted to PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE and must be downgraded. Several A1/A2 duplicates on identical-hash pages and the hss.edu vs www.hss.edu careers pair should be deduplicated downstream.

publicSafetyFailures.explanation: Claim type is SCOPE_CONFLICT and claimText is a meta-note about reclassifying source family/scope, not an offer of USCE. visibilityModelSuggested=HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED was overridden to PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE; SCOPE_CONFLICT claims should never be PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE. The underlying observership offer is already covered by hss-avp-001.

claimsToDowngrade.reason: SCOPE_CONFLICT meta-claim should not carry PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE visibility; revert to model-suggested HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED for downstream resolution.

unfollowedSignals: HSS eAcademy CME portfolio (orthopaedics, rheumatology) referenced on research-and-education page but no dedicated CME page captured
Orthopaedic surgery and rheumatology residency/fellowship programs mentioned but no dedicated GME page captured
Postdoctoral and Postbaccalaureate research training referenced on /research but no dedicated research-trainee page captured
Visiting Professional Lecture Series referenced inside AVP page but no dedicated page captured

overpromotionDetected.reason: Claim is a meta scope-reclassification note tagged PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE; not an over-promotion across tiers but a structural over-promotion of a SCOPE_CONFLICT row to a publishable USCE row.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: research-and-education page references orthopaedic surgery and rheumatology residency/fellowship programs but no GME landing or program-specific page was captured.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Fetch hss.edu/education-institute/academic-training and any /residency or /fellowship program URLs surfaced from that hub.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: AVP main page directs applicants to an 'Academic Visitor Program Guidelines' page for fee, document, and coordinator contact details that are not stated on the captured page.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Fetch the Academic Visitor Program Guidelines child URL under hss.edu/education-institute/academic-visitor-program to recover fee, contact email, and required documents.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: eAcademy CME portfolio referenced but no CME/eAcademy page captured for Tier 3 attending CME signal.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Fetch the eAcademy CME landing page linked from hss.edu/about/research-and-education.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: Postdoctoral and Postbaccalaureate research training listed in /research navigation but no detail page captured.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Fetch the Postdoctoral/Postbaccalaureate training subpage(s) under hss.edu/research.
